back_translation: Finally, brothers and sisters, pray for us — may the word of the Lord spread rapidly and receive glory, just as it does among you
And pray that we may receive rescue from people outside-of-righteousness and from evil people, because not every person has faith
But the Lord is graciously faithful — He will graciously strengthen you, and will graciously protect you from the evil one
And we are confident in the Lord concerning you, that what we instruct, you are doing and will continue to do
May the Lord graciously direct your hearts into the love of God, and into the endurance of Christ

Brothers and sisters, we instruct you in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, that you withdraw from every brother who lives in a disorderly manner, and does not walk according to the teaching that has been handed down — which they received from us
For you yourselves know how you ought to imitate us, because we were not lazy while we were with you
We did not eat anyone's food for free, but worked with arduous toil, both night and day, in order not to be a burden to anyone among you
Not because we did not have the right to receive, but in order to make ourselves an example for you, so that you might do according to our pattern
For even while we were still with you, we instructed you in this way: 'If anyone is unwilling to work, then do not let that person eat'
For we hear that some among you live in a disorderly manner, doing no work at all, but instead going around being troublesome in the affairs of others
But to such people, we instruct and beseech in the Lord Jesus Christ, that they work peacefully and eat their own food
But as for you, brothers and sisters, do not lose heart in doing good
If anyone does not obey our word in this letter, take note of and remember that person, and do not associate closely with him, in order that he may feel ashamed
And do not regard him as an enemy, but admonish him as if a brother
May the Lord of peace Himself graciously give peace to you at every time and in every way — may the Lord graciously dwell with all of you
This greeting is in my own handwriting — Paul. Which is the identifying mark of every letter of mine. I write like this
May the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ remain with all of you
